title: Blockchain with E Coins
content:
Towards the end of the year, my friends all started discussing currencies; and today, various news reports refreshed my knowledge, so after discussing it with friends recently, I decided to get involved.

Before getting into the Coins circle, I did some research and created a simple mind map using MindNode.

![E Coins NodeMind](/assets/img/post/2018-02-26-BlockchainWithECoins.png)

Below is the exported Markdown format:

## Coins

### Holding

#### EOS

#### BCH

#### USDT

### Trading Platforms

#### Bitstamp

#### BTC-e

#### BTCChina

#### OKCoin

#### HUOBIWANG

#### YUNBIWANG

### Blockchain Architecture

#### 1.0

##### Digital Currency

- BTC

- LTC

#### 2.0

##### Programmable Blockchain

- ETC (Ether)

#### 3.0

##### Blockchain Applications Beyond Currency and Finance

- ZEC

- DGD

- SC

- ZCoin

- ICO

#### BTC

##### 10 Minutes

##### 21 Million

#### LTC

##### 84 Million Coins Expected

#### ETC

- Autonomous Organizations (Autonomous Organizations)

- Smart Contracts

- Uncle Block
